# Viper String Runtime Reference

[Back to the runtime reference index](README.md)

## Classes

<a id="viper-string"></a>
### `Viper.String`

Provides immutable runtime string values and common text operations.

`Viper.String` exposes a registry-backed runtime surface without requiring callers to construct
the class directly. Its public surface exposes properties such as `IsEmpty`, `Length` and
operations including `Asc`, `CamelCase`, `Chr`, `Compare`.

#### Properties

| Property | Type | Access |
|---|---|---|
| <a id="viper-string-isempty"></a>`IsEmpty` | `i1` | read-only |
| <a id="viper-string-length"></a>`Length` | `i64` | read-only |
